# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - frontend
    - frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - name: "frontend-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
          headers:
            x-request-id:
              regex: ".*"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
            subset: stable
          weight: 90
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
            subset: canary
          weight: 10
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes
        retryRemoteLocalities: true
      fault:
        delay:
          percentage:
            value: 0
          fixedDelay: 0s
      corsPolicy:
        allowOrigins:
          - regex: ".*"
        allowMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - PATCH
          - OPTIONS
        allowHeaders:
          - authorization
          - content-type
          - x-request-id
          - x-trace-id
        exposeHeaders:
          - x-request-id
        maxAge: "24h"
        allowCredentials: true
    - name: "frontend-health-check"
      match:
        - uri:
            exact: /healthz
        - uri:
            exact: /readyz
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 80
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 5s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
        failover:
          - from: us-west
            to: us-east
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
      splitExternalLocalOriginErrors: true
      consecutiveLocalOriginFailures: 5
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
            http2MaxRequests: 1024
        loadBalancer:
          simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    - name: canary
      labels:
        version: canary
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
            http2MaxRequests: 512
        loadBalancer:
          simple: ROUND_ROBIN
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: backend-api-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - backend-api
    - backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "backend-api-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v1
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes
        retryRemoteLocalities: true
    - name: "backend-api-v2-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/v2
        - headers:
            x-api-version:
              exact: "v2"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
            subset: canary
          weight: 100
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
    - name: "backend-api-catch-all"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-api-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 2000
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 2048
        http2MaxRequests: 2048
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 200
        maxRetries: 5
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 2048
            http2MaxRequests: 2048
        loadBalancer:
          simple: LEAST_REQUEST
    - name: canary
      labels:
        version: canary
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
            http2MaxRequests: 512
        loadBalancer:
          simple: LEAST_REQUEST
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: user-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - user-service
    - user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "user-service-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8081
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: user-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
        connectTimeout: 30s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: order-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - order-service
    - order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "order-service-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8082
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 45s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 15s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1500
        connectTimeout: 30s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 150
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 20s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 40
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: payment-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - payment-service
    - payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "payment-service-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8083
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 1
        perTryTimeout: 30s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 500
        connectTimeout: 30s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
        http2MaxRequests: 512
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 1
        idleTimeout: 300s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30
      minHealthPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: notification-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - notification-service
    - notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "notification-service-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8084
            subset: stable
          weight: 100
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: notification-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 500
        connectTimeout: 15s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
        http2MaxRequests: 512
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 120s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: stable
      labels:
        version: stable
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        httpsRedirect: false
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: https
        protocol: HTTPS
      hosts:
        - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        mode: SIMPLE
        credentialName: istio-ingressgateway-certs
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: mesh-wide-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
